response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack and systems engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Their C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (only MongoDB/MySQL), and no Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure — RIDE Capital was a Node/TypeScript role in retail investment tooling, not capital markets systems.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, DevOps tooling
Broad polyglot background with proven ability to learn new stacks quickly
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, none recent and none on Windows platforms
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital markets / investment banking domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: No fixed-income / capital markets domain background
Strong general engineering and low-latency systems skills
